source_jobs.title: Sales Intern
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the role

You'll learn how to connect with a wide range of prospects and spark their interest in our authentication tech. With the support of the wider team you'll learn everything and anything about sales - from our last batch of interns, someone in the team's already been promoted to an AE.

What you'll do

 - Generate new sales opportunities with support from AEs and BDRs in the team

 - Identify companies and people to target

 - Use cold calling, e-mailing, and many more channels to reach out to your leads

 - Take part in or lead internal projects to continuously improve our processes

About you

 - Autonomous, proactive, and an excellent collaborator

 - Eager to contribute to a meaningful venture

 - Open-minded, keen on learning, and value feedback

 - Thrives in a dynamic, startup environment

Our interview process

 - 30 mins with recruiter

 - Meet with a member of the sales team

 - BDR exercise to perform

 - 60 mins with one of the co-founders

We don't expect you to ace all these stages, we will evaluate your creativity and how you approach difficult problems. You should consider applying even if you don't meet all the criteria.

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Go)
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

What will you be doing?

 - Building and scaling a distributed system using Go, DynamoDB, SQS, Redshift and Lambdas

 - Building a snappy full-stack app using cutting-edge tech (including Next on Vercel, gRPC)

 - Working on the next version of the Prelude API https://docs.prelude.so/introduction/welcome-to-prelude, which we strive to be industry-leading in terms of usability, performance and functionality

 - Ensuring that our services are scalable, extensible, reliable, and performant

 - Helping deploy and scale our fraud prevention model to hundreds of large customers

 - Developing and maintaining internal tools to improve developer efficiency

 - Interacting with clients on a daily basis to assist them and build features around their needs

 - Participating in on-call rotations to guarantee the stability and reliability of our APIs

What are we looking for?

 - Years of experience designing and engineering large-scale systems

 - Strong coding skills in Go - any experience with Rust, TypeScript or similar is a huge plus

 - A preference for simplicity vs complexity, with intuition for what will scale effectively

 - A product led mindset, keen to code for the output and the impact

 - Fluent/professional English given our international team

 - Any experience building frontends with modern frameworks like React or Vue is another huge plus

What can we offer you?

 - Competitive compensation package with BSPCEs

 - 3 days in-office in central Paris, with 2 days WFH; and 4 weeks of remote work per year

 - 100% travel to the office subsidised

 - Health insurance via Alan

 - Urban Sports Club gym membership

 - We will provide you with the gear you need for your role (a laptop and a phone, for on-call rotations)

 - Swile meal vouchers

 - Free snacks and drinks in the office

 - An annual offsite in a great location (last one was at La Pradet!)

 - The opportunity to build something from 0-1, and make an impact every day

Interview process

 - Meet a member of the Talent team

 - Technical assessment

 - In person interview (system design, coding)

 - Final meeting with CEO

We don't expect you to ace all these stages, we will evaluate your creativity and how you approach difficult problems. You should consider applying even if you don't meet all the criteria.

source_jobs.title: Velocity Account Executive - South Europe
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

This Account Executive role at Prelude is built for a high-energy, outbound-first seller who thrives prospecting and knows how to move fast. You'll be hunting and closing SMB deals at volume - owning the full cycle through to signed contract. If you love the grind of building pipeline from scratch, have a knack for quick discovery, and get a buzz from a fast close, this is the role for you.

What will you be doing?

 - Running a high-volume outbound motion - cold calling, cold emailing, and LinkedIn prospecting daily to build pipeline from the ground up, as well as working closely with our high performing BDRs

 - Owning the full sales cycle end-to-end, through to closed-won, typically within a short sales cycle

 - Quickly qualifying SMB prospects through sharp, conversational discovery to identify pain and move deals forward fast

 - Delivering concise, punchy demos tailored to SMB buyers

 - Hitting and exceeding monthly and quarterly targets for pipeline generation, activities, and closed revenue

 - Keeping HubSpot clean and up to date for accurate forecasting

What are we looking for?

 - Proven experience running a full outbound sales cycle, with a track record of closing high-volume SMB deals fast

 - A cold calling native - you're comfortable picking up the phone 50+ times a day and know how to hook a prospect in the first 30 seconds

 - SaaS sales experience is a must - you'll know what an API is and can hold your own in a conversation with a technical buyer

 - Consistent quota attainment and overachievement - we want to see the numbers, not just the narrative

 - Sharp, instinctive discovery skills - you can uncover pain quickly

 - Natural curiosity and hunger to become a product expert, so every conversation is relevant and consultative

 - Fluency in English and at least one of: Spanish, Italian, Portuguese

 - Familiarity with HubSpot is a nice to have

 - Genuine excitement for what Prelude is building

What do we offer?

 - Competitive base salary with generous, uncapped commission + BSPCEs

 - Hybrid working style: 4 days in-office in Paris, 1 day remote

 - High-end gear and ergonomic setup

 - 100% travel subsidised to our Paris office

 - Private health insurance

 - Swile meal vouchers

 - Gym pass

 - Annual offsites in great locations

 - The opportunity to be part of building

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the role

As an Enterprise Account Executive at Prelude, you won’t just be closing deals, you’ll be helping our GTM strategy. You’ll own complex, high-value sales cycles end-to-end, from landing your first enterprise conversations to running polished demos, navigating multi-stakeholder deals, and closing top tier customers.

You’ll work directly with the founders, partnering closely with product, marketing, and engineering to shape our enterprise motion, refine our messaging, and influence the roadmap based on what customers actually need. Your impact will be visible, measurable, and felt across the company.

This role is built for an ambitious B2B SaaS AE who’s ready to step into bigger deals, more autonomy, and real ownership. If you’re excited by fast growth, high standards, and the chance to help build an enterprise sales engine from the inside, this is your seat at the table.

What will you be doing?

 - Owning and managing your pipeline across the entire enterprise sales cycle

 - Identifying and prioritizing high value prospects in our target market

 - Running tailored discovery calls and product demos aligning with prospect pain points

 - Collaborating with Engineering and Product to deliver customized proposals where needed

 - Working in a structured way to ensure you meet or exceed quota each year

 - Tracking activities and pipeline in our CRM, HubSpot

 - Sharing market feedback to tailor product development and positioning

 - Iterating and improving sales collateral and pricing models - you’re early enough to help us define “how sales works” at Prelude

 - Representing Prelude at key events, conferences, and client meetings

What are we looking for?

 - Prior experience in enterprise sales with a B2B SaaS company, ideally a start-up or scale-up

 - A proven track record of exceeding quota and closing new business

 - Confidence managing a complex full sales cycle, from outbound prospecting through to contract negotiation

 - Ability to sell technical products to technical stakeholders - we'd expect you to know at the very least what an API is, for example

 - Familiarity with CRM tools like HubSpot, Salesforce and Pipedrive is helpful

 - Curiosity and sharp discovery skills, with a consultative sales approach

 - Comfort working in ambiguity in a fast-paced start-up environment

source_jobs.title: Senior Customer Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.


ABOUT THE ROLE


This is more than a typical support role. You’ll be one of the first senior support hires at Prelude, with real ownership over how the function takes shape as we grow.

When a developer at Voodoo is debugging a webhook signature, when X sees unexpected 429s in production, when Tipalti walks through a retry policy with us, or when Suno is troubleshooting a delivery rate dip in our API logs, you’re the person on the other end. You set the tone for how Prelude shows up: technically sharp, calm under pressure, and genuinely useful when something is on fire.

You won’t inherit a finished playbook. You’ll help shape it, alongside a team that’s excited to learn from you as much as it wants to support your growth here.



WHAT YOU’LL DO


 - Own end-to-end technical support for our developer customers: engineers integrating our SDKs, debugging webhooks, exploring our API logs, asking thoughtful questions about rate limits and retry behavior. You’ll triage, investigate, and resolve issues, working closely with Engineering whenever a fix or deeper dive is needed.

 - Help onboard our new customers, partnering with Sales and Engineering to turn a signed deal into a smooth integration and a confident first weeks in production.

 - Proactively monitor key accounts to look for ways to improve their experience and optimize their usage of Prelude. Spot usage anomalies, untapped features, and integration patterns worth refining, and reach out before customers have to ask.

 - Develop a deep understanding of how our clients’ businesses work and how their end-users interact with our platform. The more context you carry, the sharper the help you offer, and the more useful the signal you can route back to Product.

 - Get into our customers’ code. Reproduce their integrations, run their curl calls, read our SDK source when their stack trace points there, and send back answers that include the exact request, the response, and a clear explanation of what happened, not just “we’re looking into it.”

 - Help us build the foundations of our support function as we scale: runbooks, on-call rotation, escalation paths, SLAs, internal triage, customer-facing status communication. A lot of this is still being defined, and your judgment on what it should look like is welcome from day one.

 - Bring AI into the workf

source_jobs.title: Founding Device Fingerprinting Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.


ABOUT THE ROLE

Fingerprinting is becoming a first-class pillar of Prelude's fraud detection engine — and this is the founding role that will define it. You will own the entire fingerprinting surface: architecture, research, production systems, and eventually the team we build around you. You'll report directly to leadership and shape the roadmap from scratch.

Fraud is an adversarial game. Attackers use emulators, residential proxies, VPNs, device spoofing, and anti-detect tooling to flood our customers' authentication pipelines with fake traffic. Your job is to make that invisible — or at least expensive enough not to be worth it.

You'll build the systems that collect, process, and exploit device and network signals at scale: from raw hardware attributes and TLS fingerprints to IP risk scoring and carrier intelligence. You'll combine classical feature engineering with ML to produce high-fidelity risk signals that feed our real-time scoring engine — processing millions of authentication attempts per day in milliseconds.

This role sits at the intersection of security research, systems engineering, and applied machine learning. It's for someone who thinks like an attacker, builds like an engineer, and reasons like a data scientist.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

 - Owning the fingerprinting roadmap end to end — from signal collection in our mobile SDKs (iOS, Android) and server-side APIs, to the feature engineering pipelines that turn raw attributes into fraud signals

 - Building and hardening device fingerprinting systems — persistent device identity across app reinstalls, rooted/emulated device detection, hardware attestation, and spoofing resistance for both web and mobile contexts

 - Developing network intelligence signals — IP reputation scoring, proxy/VPN/datacenter detection, TLS/JA4 fingerprinting, carrier and MCCMNC enrichment, and residential vs. commercial traffic classification

 - Applying ML to fingerprinting problems — anomaly detection on device attribute distributions, clustering to identify fraud rings sharing infrastructure, supervised classification of suspicious signal patterns, and adversarial robustness against evolving evasion techniques

 - Integrating with our real-time scoring engine — producing low-latency features that enrich our per-authentication risk model under strict

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

What will you be doing?

 - Building polished, high-performance user interfaces using React and Typescript, with a strong focus on usability, speed, and design quality

 - Owning features end to end — from the React frontend through the Go backend, APIs, and data layer

 - Working across the stack on our distributed system using Go, DynamoDB, SQS, Redshift, and Lambdas

 - Shaping and building the next version of the Prelude API https://docs.prelude.so/introduction/welcome-to-prelude, which we strive to be industry-leading in terms of usability, performance, and functionality

 - Designing and building internal tools and dashboards that improve developer and team efficiency

 - Helping deploy and scale our fraud prevention model to hundreds of large customers

 - Interacting with clients on a daily basis to assist them and build features around their needs

 - Participating in on-call rotations to guarantee the stability and reliability of our services

What are we looking for?

 - Strong experience building frontends with modern frameworks : React is ideal, Vue or similar also welcome

 - Solid backend skills in Go or TypeScript, with the ability to design and build reliable APIs and services

 - Years of experience working across the full stack, from UI to infrastructure

 - A preference for simplicity vs complexity, with intuition for what will scale effectively

 - A keen eye for product and UX — you care about what the user sees and experiences, not just what the code does

 - A product-led mindset, keen to code for the output and the impact

 - Fluent/professional English given our international team

 - Any experience with Rust, gRPC, or AWS serverless (Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS) is a plus

What can we offer you?

 - Competitive compensation package with BSPCEs

 - 3 days in-office in central Paris, with 2 days WFH; and 4 weeks of remote work per year

 - 100% travel to the office subsidised

 - Health insurance via Alan

 - Urban Sports Club gym membership

 - We will provide you with the gear you need for your role (a laptop and a phone, for on-call rotations)

 - Swile meal vouchers

 - Free snacks and drinks in the office

 - An annual offsite in a great location (last one was at La Pradet!)

 - The opportunity to build something from 0-1, and make an impact every day

Interview process

source_jobs.title: Mid Market Account Executive - German Speaking
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the Role

As a Mid-Market Account Executive, you'll be responsible for driving growth across one of Prelude’s most strategic segments: mid-sized businesses with high-scale authentication needs. You’ll own the full sales cycle, manage complex evaluations with multiple stakeholders, and partner closely with our technical teams to deliver high-impact solutions.

You’ll help shape our mid-market motion, refine our GTM strategy, and play a meaningful role in expanding Prelude’s footprint across Europe and beyond. This is an excellent opportunity for someone who has experience closing mid-market deals and wants to join a fast-growing startup where their impact is immediate and visible.

What will you be doing?

• Owning and managing the sales cycle for mid-market accounts, from outbound prospecting to contract execution.

• Building and maintaining a strong pipeline of high-value prospects across key verticals.

• Leading consultative discovery processes to understand customer needs, technical requirements, and decision criteria.

• Delivering high-quality demos and value-driven pitches tailored to mid-market use cases.

• Navigating multiple stakeholders — from product and engineering to procurement and legal.

• Consistently exceeding quota while maintaining healthy win rates and sales velocity.

• Delivering on cross-sell, up-sell and renewal opportunities

• Sharing insights from customer interactions to help refine product strategy, messaging, and positioning.

• Representing Prelude at industry events, conferences, and on-site customer meetings.

What are we looking for?

• Experience in B2B SaaS sales, including experience closing mid-market deals.

• A strong track record of achieving or exceeding quota.

• Confidence managing multi-stakeholder, multi-step sales processes

• Curiosity - you'll enjoy unpacking how products work under the hood.

• The ability to think strategically about accounts, to identify and engage economic buyers.

• Someone who will thrive in a fast-paced environment, who enjoys taking initiative.

• Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.

• Fluency in English and German

• Enthusiasm for our product and potential

What we offer:

• Competitive salary with uncapped commission and generous BSPCEs.

• Hybrid working style: 4 days in-office, 1 day remote

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Internal Tools
source_jobs.description:

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.


About the role

Internal tooling is not a backlog item at Prelude — it's a strategic lever. As we scale from 50 to a much larger team, the speed at which engineering, ops, sales, support, and finance can operate depends on the tools we put in their hands.

You'll own that surface. You'll build the internal tools and AI-powered automation that make every team at Prelude move faster, ship with confidence, and spend their time on the work that actually matters. You'll work directly with internal stakeholders to find friction and turn it into functional, reliable software — and you'll be our edge in AI engineering, evaluating and integrating the tools that define how a modern company operates. Here are some examples of projects :

 - Interconnect the various internal tools we use (hubspot, linear, plain and more)

 - Optimize the way we calculate and aggregate our billing

 - Build flows and use AI to automate our internal processes (invoicing/reporting/support)

This is a high-ownership IC role on the Platform team, with direct access to your internal customers from day one.


What will you be doing?

 - Owning the design, development, and maintenance of internal tools used daily across engineering, ops, product, sales, support, and finance

 - Building agentic AI workflows that automate repetitive internal processes and unlock new capabilities for our teams (fraud review, customer support triage, GTM workflows, ops dashboards, and more)

 - Working directly with stakeholders across all teams to identify friction and turn it into functional solutions, with feedback loops measured in days, not quarters

 - Evaluating and integrating the latest AI engineering tools (Claude, Cursor, n8n, Dust, and whatever comes next) and setting the standard for how Prelude leverages them internally

 - Contributing to our polyglot codebase and collaborating with the broader engineering team on shared infrastructure, schemas, and APIs

 - Designing and building internal dashboards on top of our data layer (DynamoDB, Clickhouse and Postgres) to give every team visibility into what they need to act on

 - Participating in on-call rotations for the internal platform you build
   

What are we looking for?

 - Software engineer with experience shipping in high-paced environments and a track record of finishing what you start

About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the role

As a core member of our Sales team, you’ll connect with a wide range of prospects and spark their interest in our authentication tech. You’ll be on the front lines of our growth engine - partnering with AEs and fellow BDRs to uncover opportunities, start meaningful conversations, and fuel a steady pipeline of qualified leads, and owning the entire lifecycle for smaller deals.

What you'll do

As a Business Development Representative, you’ll be the spark that gets companies excited about our product. You’ll be reaching out to prospects across every level - from procurement managers and lead engineers to heads of anti-fraud, platform owners, CTOs, CPOs, and even CEOs. Your day to day will involve:

 - Igniting new sales opportunities for Prelude

 - Identifying companies and people to target within your verticals/territories

 - Cold calling and emailing as well as experimenting with other channels to find new leads

 - Qualifying leads and pitching Prelude's value proposition

 - Improving processes as we scale our business

About you

 - Proactive mindset with a relentless drive to start conversations, build momentum, and close deals

 - You know your way around HubSpot, Sales Navigator, Apollo, Phantombuster, or Kaspr

 - Self-directed, resourceful, and a great team player

 - Curious, coachable, and eager to learn by doing and ask questions

 - Thrives in a fast-paced, ever-evolving startup environment

 - Confidence speaking English daily, and the ability to fluently speak German

What we offer

 - Competitive compensation package (base + uncapped commission)

 - Comprehensive health insurance plan

 - Urban Sports Club gym membership

 - 100% transport subsidised

 - Swile meal vouchers

 - Pet-friendly office environment

 - Free snacks and drinks in the office

 - Laptop and equipment needed to do the role

 - Hybrid working style: 4 days at the office and 1 day at home

 - An annual offsite in a great location (last one was at Le Pradet)

Interview process

 - Call with recruiter

 - Call with Sales team member

 - Roleplay session

 - CEO interview and team meet

We don't expect you to ace all these stages - we will evaluate your creativity and how you approach difficult problems. You should consider applying even if you don't meet all the criteria; we'll carefully review all o

source_jobs.title: Senior Customer Support Engineer US/CA/LATAM
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.


ABOUT THE ROLE


This is more than a typical support role. You’ll be one of the first senior support hires at Prelude, with real ownership over how the function takes shape as we grow.

When a developer at Voodoo is debugging a webhook signature, when X sees unexpected 429s in production, when Tipalti walks through a retry policy with us, or when Suno is troubleshooting a delivery rate dip in our API logs, you’re the person on the other end. You set the tone for how Prelude shows up: technically sharp, calm under pressure, and genuinely useful when something is on fire.

You won’t inherit a finished playbook. You’ll help shape it, alongside a team that’s excited to learn from you as much as it wants to support your growth here.



WHAT YOU’LL DO


 - Own end-to-end technical support for our developer customers: engineers integrating our SDKs, debugging webhooks, exploring our API logs, asking thoughtful questions about rate limits and retry behavior. You’ll triage, investigate, and resolve issues, working closely with Engineering whenever a fix or deeper dive is needed.

 - Help onboard our new customers, partnering with Sales and Engineering to turn a signed deal into a smooth integration and a confident first weeks in production.

 - Proactively monitor key accounts to look for ways to improve their experience and optimize their usage of Prelude. Spot usage anomalies, untapped features, and integration patterns worth refining, and reach out before customers have to ask.

 - Develop a deep understanding of how our clients’ businesses work and how their end-users interact with our platform. The more context you carry, the sharper the help you offer, and the more useful the signal you can route back to Product.

 - Get into our customers’ code. Reproduce their integrations, run their curl calls, read our SDK source when their stack trace points there, and send back answers that include the exact request, the response, and a clear explanation of what happened, not just “we’re looking into it.”

 - Help us build the foundations of our support function as we scale: runbooks, on-call rotation, escalation paths, SLAs, internal triage, customer-facing status communication. A lot of this is still being defined, and your judgment on what it should look like is welcome from day one.

 - Bring AI into the workf

source_jobs.title: Founding Brand Marketer
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the role

We’re hiring our first dedicated Brand Marketer - there’s no playbook yet, and as the first hire in this position you'll be the one writing it! You’ll own how Prelude presents itself to the world - brand voice, social presence, content, events, PR - all of the work that turns curious developers and founders into customers. You'll also represent the company externally across different audiences.

This is a hands-on role with a lot of autonomy, working directly with the founders and partnering closely with engineering, design, and sales. This position reports into our co-founder and CEO, Matias, and works closely with our Marketing Manager - who will own performance marketing and SEO.

What will you do?

 - Frame our positioning and messaging, outlining Prelude's tone of voice and identity

 - Own Prelude's voice (including the Founders) across LinkedIn, X, Hacker News and other sites

 - Turn product launches, customer wins, and industry moments into on-brand posts (the more personality the better), owning our content calendar and shipping consistently

 - Run weekly experiments - posts, threads, replies, comments - and iterate based on what lands

 - Partner with design to develop the site, decks, ads, and swag

 - Pitch Prelude as a speaker to priority events as well as international media across business, but also newsletters and influencers.

 - Own our events strategy and organisation end to end: founder dinners, hackathons, developer conferences, tracking ROI and reporting on outcomes

 - Set goals with the founders and report on them weekly, bringing a commercial mindset to every channel decision

 - Use AI tools to scale output - editing agents, asset generation, and whatever else makes sense

What are we looking for?

 - Experience in brand, growth, or content marketing - ideally from B2B SaaS but we’re open minded and happy to consider candidates from B2C or agency

 - Strong writing instincts across different formats - short-form social, long-form editorial, email, and event copy

 - Budget ownership and management

 - Confidence speaking publicly and building media relationships, representing Prelude externally

 - Experience planning and running events people actually remember

 - A genuine interest in developer-first products - you need to talk credibly to engineers and fo

source_jobs.title: Mid Market Account Executive - English Speaking
source_jobs.description:
About Prelude

Prelude is redefining how companies authenticate and onboard users - turning what's traditionally a cost center into a growth lever.

Our flagship product lets businesses send OTP codes with the best price-to-conversion ratio on the market, dynamically selecting the most effective channel in real time (optimized SMS, WhatsApp, and more) while actively blocking spam and fraud that legacy providers miss.

Founded in 2022 by former Zenly team members who lived the pain of broken SMS authentication firsthand, we're already serving fast-growing companies across Europe and are expanding into the US.

But authentication is only the starting point - we're building the platform for trust at scale, with an ambitious roadmap of market-defining products ahead.

Why join us

Today, we're a team of 60 and growing, based in Paris, building products that power secure and high-performance user onboarding for companies across the world. We believe small, highly skilled teams outperform large, fragmented organizations, and we are intentional about staying focused on impact, quality, and speed.

We operate with a flat org structure and value in-person collaboration, which helps ideas move faster, decisions stay grounded, and teams take full ownership of what they build.
Our values

 - Care
   We care deeply about our customers, our teammates, and the quality and reliability of what we ship.

 - Bias for Action
   We move fast, test in the real world, and iterate quickly rather than over-optimizing in theory.

 - Ownership
   We take responsibility end to end, from identifying problems to delivering outcomes and learning from results.

About the Role

As a Mid-Market Account Executive, you'll be responsible for driving growth across one of Prelude’s most strategic segments: mid-sized businesses with high-scale authentication needs. You’ll own the full sales cycle, manage complex evaluations with multiple stakeholders, and partner closely with our technical teams to deliver high-impact solutions.

You’ll help shape our mid-market motion, refine our GTM strategy, and play a meaningful role in expanding Prelude’s footprint across Europe and beyond. This is an excellent opportunity for someone who has experience closing mid-market deals and wants to join a fast-growing startup where their impact is immediate and visible.

What will you be doing?

• Owning and managing the sales cycle for mid-market accounts, from outbound prospecting to contract execution.

• Building and maintaining a strong pipeline of high-value prospects across key verticals.

• Leading consultative discovery processes to understand customer needs, technical requirements, and decision criteria.

• Delivering high-quality demos and value-driven pitches tailored to mid-market use cases.

• Navigating multiple stakeholders — from product and engineering to procurement and legal.

• Consistently exceeding quota while maintaining healthy win rates and sales velocity.

• Delivering on cross-sell, up-sell and renewal opportunities

• Sharing insights from customer interactions to help refine product strategy, messaging, and positioning.

• Representing Prelude at industry events, conferences, and on-site customer meetings.

What are we looking for?

• Experience in B2B SaaS sales, including experience closing mid-market deals.

• A strong track record of achieving or exceeding quota.

• Confidence managing multi-stakeholder, multi-step sales processes

• Curiosity - you'll enjoy unpacking how products work under the hood.

• The ability to think strategically about accounts, to identify and engage economic buyers.

• Someone who will thrive in a fast-paced environment, who enjoys taking initiative.

• Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.

• Fluency in English

• Enthusiasm for our product and potential

What we offer:

• Competitive salary with uncapped commission and generous BSPCEs.

• Hybrid working style: 4 days in-office, 1 day remote

• High-qual

notes: Prelude is a fast-growing company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, indicating a strong engineering core but also a significant sales and customer support presence.
